UAAYYAAYAYAYAUAUAAY I looked at all the Hunter bots, and I saw how barely any are here ☠️ My Christmas break is ending soon, and I’ll have to go back- so I’ll try to keep on making bots :) making bots is so hard for me to do on a regular basis I’m so sorry, it’s just I never find the time to do so 😭
